title: jasminum venustum
intro: Jasminum venustum, also known as Himalayan star jasmine, is a flowering evergreen vine native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Jasminum venustum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Jasminum venustum include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
